next_steps: Perform Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scintigraphy to evaluate for transthyretin cardiac amyloidosis
Obtain quantitative serum free light-chain assay, serum protein electrophoresis, and immunofixation to rule out AL amyloidosis
Measure alpha-galactosidase A activity and GLA gene sequencing to evaluate for Fabry disease
Perform right heart catheterization to assess for restrictive versus constrictive physiology
Perform cardiac MRI T1 mapping and extracellular volume (ECV) quantification
Screen for systemic features of amyloidosis, including history of carpal tunnel syndrome, lumbar spinal stenosis, and albuminuria
